login.feature1Desc: Your workspace is synchronized and ready for new document nodes.
login.feature2Desc: Manage permissions and groups with enterprise-grade precision.
login.heading: Login
login.subheading: Please enter your credentials to continue.

signup.heading: Create Account
signup.subheading: Join the next generation of curators.
signup.inviteBanner: You are completing signup from a group invitation. Organization fields are not required.

verify.description: We have dispatched a temporary access token to your authorized workspace email. Enter it to establish a secure session.
verify.heading: Authorize Device
verify.subheading: Please enter the 6-digit code sent to your email.

forgotPassword.description: Security is our core philosophy. Follow the verified recovery protocol to regain control of your intelligence workspace.
forgotPassword.heading: Recover Access
forgotPassword.subheading: It happens to the best of us. Enter your email to receive recovery instructions.
forgotPassword.orgIdPlaceholder: If your workspace uses multi-tenant routing
forgotPassword.checkEmailDesc: Security instructions have been dispatched to

resetPassword.heading: Set new password
resetPassword.successMessage: Password updated. Redirecting to sign in…

setupPassword.inviteBadgeDesc: No standalone signup Outside your organization
setupPassword.heading: Set Up Password
setupPassword.subheading: Finish your invitation setup to continue.
